issues.description: TOC shows 'Winners and Losers' and 'Dice Roll Variations' as top-level sections but document renders them as subsections
issues.example: TOC lists 'Winners and Losers' page 6, but in document it appears as H2 under 'What Is Roleplaying?'
issues.suggested_fix: Verify if these are actually subsections; if so, TOC hierarchy may need adjustment or they may be correctly placed as H2
